items.title: AP explains as Putin comes out of summit with Trump's backing and less pressure to end conflict
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>In Alaska, President Vladimir Putin walked on a red carpet, shook hands and exchanged smiles with his American counterpart. Donald Trump ended the summit praising their relationship and Russia as a superpower, even after admitting they didn't reach a deal on ending the war in Ukraine. 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Trump heads to golf course a day after meeting with Putin in Alaska
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>U.S. President Donald Trump headed for his golf course Saturday, a day after his Friday meeting with Russian President Vladimir Putin in Alaska.

items.title: Flooding in northwest Pakistan kills at least 220 people, officials say
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Flooding in a northwest Pakistani district has killed at least 220 people, officials said Saturday, as rescuers pulled 63 more bodies overnight from homes flattened by flash floods and landslides.


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Hurricane Erin explodes in strength to a Category 5 storm in the Caribbean
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Hurricane Erin exploded in strength to a Category 5 storm in the Caribbean on Saturday, rapidly powering up from a tropical storm in a single day, the National Hurricane Center said. 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Putin briefs top Russian officials on his talks with Trump in Alaska
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Russian President Vladimir Putin on Saturday described his talks with U.S. President Donald Trump in Alaska as “very frank” and said both sides expressed a shared interest in ending the war in Ukraine.

items.title: Air Canada suspends operations as flight attendants go on strike
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Air Canada suspended operations as more than 10,000 Air Canada flight attendants went on strike early Saturday after a deadline to reach a deal passed, leaving travelers around the world stranded and scrambling during the peak summer travel season.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Celebrations for the Hindu festival of Janmashtami in Nepal
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Devotees Nepal are celebrating the festival of Janmashtami Saturday, marking the birth of Krishna, the popular Hindu god who is a symbol of love, compassion and harmony. (AP video by Upendra Mansingh)

items.title: Search for survivors continue after many dead in flash floods in India-controlled Kashmir
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The search for survivors continued Saturday in India-controlled Kashmir following deadly flash floods which killed 60 and injured around 150 people. (AP Video by Channi Anand)

items.title: Former British ambassador to Russia shares analysis of Trump and Putin Alaska meeting
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The former British Ambassador to Russia said Saturday that the high-stakes meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin was a diplomatic victory for Russia.

items.title: Residents in Kyiv share their reaction to the Trump-Putin Alaska meeting
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Kyiv residents reacted with skepticism Saturday to the U.S.-Russia summit in Alasks, saying it was hard to understand how the Russian president was welcomed in the U.S. (AP video by Alex Babenko)

items.title: AP photographer describes attending Trump and Putin meeting in Alaska
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>An Associated Press photographer who attended the U.S.-Russia summit in Alaska Friday said she was struck by the warm body language between the two leaders.

items.content:
<article>Iconic landmarks in London were lit up with Union Jack flags on Friday evening to mark the 80th Anniversary of VJ Day.

items.title: Putin lays flowers at graves for Soviet World War II pilots during Alaska visit
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>After holding talks with U.S. President Donald Trump in Alaska on Friday, Russian President Vladimir Putin traveled to a cemetery to lay flowers on the graves of Soviet pilots buried in the state.

items.title: Fireworks and light show illuminate Versailles Palace as crowds enjoy spectacle in Chateau's gardens
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>For the fifth year in a row, the Nocturnal Fountain Show of Fire lit up the gardens of the Palace of Versailles on Friday night, drawing 16,000 spectators to an evening of music, flames and aerial choreography (AP Video shot by Nicolas Garriga).

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Serbia's police clash with anti-government protesters in downtown Belgrade
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Police fired tear gas at anti-government protesters in downtown Belgrade as they clashed for the third day on Friday in the Serbian capital and other cities amid reports of police brutality and excessive use of force during the unrest. (AP Video shot by Marko Drobnjakovic)
